query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: Horizontal bands and thin lines in shades of teal and salmon pink stretch across a solid black background. The lines vary in thickness and brightness, forming a striped pattern with no discernible figures, objects, or scenery. A semi-transparent watermark reading '© 3DTotal/challenge.com' is visible in the lower left corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract composition evoking analog media degradation through dense horizontal scanlines and tracking-error streaks across the frame. Bands of teal and salmon pink of varying thickness interrupt the black background, creating a corrupted, lo-fi signal aesthetic with no recognizable subject matter. A semi-transparent watermark in the lower left corner reads '© 3DTotal/challenge.com'.
